problem id: ed5c81ae
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5) AND NOT SHL(2)

examples:
  10100100 -> 00000100
  00011100 -> 10000011
  10010110 -> 10000010
  00001100 -> 10000001
  10000111 -> 11100000
  10011001 -> 00010011
  10111010 -> 00010111
  01011011 -> 00000011

query: 00100101
predicted answer: 00100000
